vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements: Provide structural support for wing spars
Ensure thermal management for motor pylon
Allow equipment bay access
Mount motor pylon with cooling inlet
Attach to left and right wing structures

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the equipment bay door hinge.

risk.desc: Limited accessibility for maintenance due to compact design.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between FDM and EPP foam core materials.
risk.mit: Review and adjust tolerances during manufacturing setup.

requirements: Structures: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
Interfaces: At least three adjacent interfaces or mounting datums
Internal Features: Decomposed into 5-9 meaningful internal child features
Geometry: Represented with explicit coordinate-bearing geometry_ops
Interfaces: Include at least three negative/service features
Reciprocal Interface: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels
Budget Rule: Mass estimate within 250g
Joint Evidence: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence
Training Quality: Part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable

cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface
risk.mit: Implement strict assembly guidelines and training

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion affecting fit and function
risk.mit: Use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients

risk.desc: Battery bay accessibility may be compromised if cutout is too small
risk.mit: Review and adjust cutout dimensions based on battery size

risk.desc: Sensor pocket depth might affect sensor installation
risk.mit: Ensure sensor pocket depth matches sensor requirements

risk.desc: Carry-through length may not provide sufficient structural integrity
risk.mit: Increase carry-through length or add reinforcement

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate additional stiffeners near high-stress areas
Optimize harness routing for minimal drag and weight
Add heat sinks or cooling channels near electronics

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and axis rings
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.5mm for structural interfaces, ±0.2mm for electrical connectors
manufacturing_strategy.support_orientation: Support structures oriented for easy removal post-printing
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, tactile for electrical interfaces

verification_focus.description: Ensure lift forces transfer through spar to fuselage frames
Verify key prevents unwanted rotation during flight

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to lightening pockets.
risk.mit: Increase wall thickness around lightening pockets.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to complex snap-fit interfaces.
risk.mit: Add alignment pins and chamfers to guide assembly.

risk.desc: Possible aerodynamic performance degradation due to control surface cutouts.
risk.mit: Optimize shape and location of cutouts for minimal drag.

risk.desc: Risk of improper load path continuity if ribs are not properly integrated.
risk.mit: Ensure ribs are fully integrated with spar and fuselage frames.

risk.desc: Potential for increased manufacturing complexity with multiple interfaces.
risk.mit: Simplify interfaces where possible to reduce complexity.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the control horn mount due to insufficient reinforcement.
risk.mit: Add additional ribs or stiffeners around the control horn mount area.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage due to inadequate strain relief at cable exits.

risk.desc: Possible interference with adjacent components if clearance is not maintained.
risk.mit: Review and adjust clearances to ensure sufficient space for all components.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and ensure keying to prevent mis-mating.

risk.desc: Potential thermal issues if cooling duct is blocked or improperly positioned.
risk.mit: Verify airflow path and ensure cooling duct is unobstructed and properly positioned.
